samplePacks.name: fbass / fguitar / fpiano
samplePacks.usage: sliced funk recordings across Invoque l'Été

samplePacks.name: FMRhodes1 / FMRhodes2
samplePacks.usage: FM synthesis piano in Solar, Lunar, Atari-ght

samplePacks.name: bassWarsaw
samplePacks.usage: primary analog-modeled bass in Solar, Lunar, Burn this Book

samplePacks.name: 90s_synatm / 90s_matrix
samplePacks.usage: atmospheric 90s synth pads in Nightly Repair, Burn this Book

samplePacks.name: drums_atari / synth_commodore
samplePacks.usage: 8-bit drum machines and Commodore synth in Atari-ght

samplePacks.name: moogBass
samplePacks.usage: warm Moog synth in Invoque l'Été and Alerte Verte

samplePacks.name: 808bd / 808lc / 808hc / 808mc
samplePacks.usage: Roland 808 drum sounds in kick patterns and clave

ingredients.description: 115 BPM summer lounge with MIDI mask/mute system for live performance
Latin-inspired clave pattern on snare driving the groove
Trio of sliced funk recordings: bass, guitar, piano -  each loopAt 2-4 cycles
Variable slice count on bass creates evolving rhythmic phrase
Moog chord progression Am-G-Am-D with frequency shift for movement
110 BPM nostalgic breakbeat with dual DJF bus filters
E major bassWarsaw with converge/diverge arpeggiation over 16 cycles
High-passed break sample sliced into 8, with striate and ply transforms
PWM synth lead with quinte/quarte 2nd oscillator and accelerate sweeps
FM Rhodes with MIDI-controlled modulation index for timbral morphing
110 BPM companion piece to Solar -  darker breakbeat
Aeolian bassWarsaw walking line with rests and direction changes
4 break variations cycling over 32 bars, sliced 8-way
Rhodes self-superimposition with octave Euclidean ornaments
Lower modIndex range than Solar -  warmer, more contained FM tone
120 BPM lounge with piano, brass choir, and organ
3-voice brass choir (a/b/c) with independent note offsets and pinkyup arp
Sliced piano, organ, and 120BPM break for jazzy layering
Piano juxtaposed with reversed copy for stereo depth
MIDI bitcrush on brass with room reverb for warmth
90 BPM dark slow techno -  'La nuit te répare'

ingredients.code: note ("<bf g bf g bf g bf c c!4 g bf c6@2>" - 24) # "90s_matrix:3"
ingredients.description: Bb-G bass oscillation with rare C6 jumps, Leslie speaker modulation
Blues scale Rhodes with 4 rotating arpeggio modes
MIDI-controlled Leslie speaker on bass with accelerating rotation
Sub-octave doubling on 90s synth pads for depth
90 BPM atmospheric techno with 3-layer mute system
Aeolian high lead with sparse melodic questioning -  'Winds of truth'
Aerial 90s synths for questions and answers, jungle breaks for rhythm
Every 32 cycles: 8-cycle burst of arpeggiated 'echoes of doubts'
Dual MIDI control: bitcrush + panoramic sweep on lead synth
120 BPM dark techno -  ASCII fire art header
Aeolian bass on cpluck with stacked intervals and Warsaw superimposition
CPU hat, NES drums with delay, and long 90s synth pad
MIDI-inverted probability mask on aeolian arp -  more knob = more notes
NES drums through delay with feedback building to near-infinite at bar 4
165 BPM fast DnB with run-and-stumble kick pattern

ingredients.code: midiOn "^41" (<| "k <k!4 ~ k!3> k <k [~ k] k [<k!4 ~!3 k> k]>") -- Run & stumble
ingredients.description: Kick alternates between frantic run pattern and sparse waiting mode
90s burning synth bass, FM Rhodes ritornello, Matrix voices from the storm
Converging arp on aeolian bass creates tension on MIDI trigger
Squiz distortion on matrix voices for lo-fi choir effect
120 BPM chiptune -  with ASCII Atari console art
FM Rhodes rain pattern: Cm-Eb-Gm chord arps with down direction
Atari drums, Commodore 64 synth bus, and 808 kick
Double MIDI distortion on Commodore synth: bitcrush + squiz
FM Rhodes with sixteenth and eighth note offset echoes
160 BPM DnB with 32-cycle bridge dynamics
808 clave pattern alternating low/mid/high cowbell
Resolute sliced bass, dual guitar A/B, moog pads, and siren

ingredients.code: $ midiOn "^57" (rev . slice 8 "0 [1 0] 2 <3 0 3 3*4>") -- La morale à l'envers
ingredients.description: Reversed bass slicing: 'morality upside down' on MIDI trigger
Delayed kick with feedback building across 16-bar phrase
110 BPM breakbeat with 3-layer mute/mask system
808+kick layered with variable fourth beat -  run or stumble
Atari drums chopped into 32, 165BPM breaks, burning 90s synth bass
Bass self-superimposition with note offsets and variable chop density
Bitcrush on 90s synth ghost pads -  'Ghosts from an easier time'
